label: Data Query
description: Run a vector / collection query against a configured datasource. Returns the matching results so downstream nodes can summarise, rank, or feed an LLM.

settings.name: collection
settings.label: Collection
settings.description: Name of the collection / index to query. Falls back to 'default' when blank.

settings.name: collectionName
settings.label: Collection (alt field)
settings.description: Alternate field name accepted for backwards compatibility — same meaning as 'collection'.

settings.name: query
settings.label: Query
settings.description: Semantic / text query. When blank, falls back to input.query, input.message, or the raw input.

settings.name: filters
settings.label: Filters
settings.description: Optional metadata filters. Either an object or a JSON-stringified template.

settings.name: limit
settings.label: Top K
settings.description: Maximum number of results to return.

ai.shortDescription: Vector / collection search against the platform's datastore.
ai.whenToUse: When you need to retrieve documents or rows tied to a query so a later node can use them.
ai.examplePrompt: search the 'docs' collection for the user's topic and pass the top 5 results to the LLM
ai.promptHints: Reference the hits via {{steps.<id>.results}}. Use limit=5 for a tight LLM context.

outputAssertions.name: non_empty_content
outputAssertions.errorMessage: Data Query returned zero results — likely the collection is empty, the query is too narrow, or filters excluded everything. Investigate the source rather than treating this as a successful retrieval.
